rows.description: 1797 Recepta varia £ s d
rows.notes: Adopted description from gemini-flash as it includes '1797' and '£ s d' which are clearly visible on the same conceptual line in the image as 'Recepta varia'. Both agreed on no monetary amounts.

rows.description: Nov. 3 Of Mr. Demainbray, Dean, Fees to Mrs. Cast
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash for accurate description (specifically 'Mrs. Cast' and 'Mr.'). Amounts are clearly visible as 3 6 8 and were in consensus.
rows.english_description: Fee payment received from Mr Demainbray, the Dean, intended for Mrs Cast.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fee payment received from Mr Demainbray, the Dean, on behalf of Mrs Cast, amounting to £3 6s 8d.

rows.description: Dec. 1 Of Mr. Cooke, Bookham, 1st half Year of 1798 Dr. Shortrudges Benefaction due Midm. 1797
rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identified this as a single entry with description spanning two lines and one associated amount (110 0 0). gpt-5-mini incorrectly split this into two separate rows without an amount for the first part.
rows.english_description: Payment received from Mr Cooke of Bookham for the first half-year instalment of Dr Shortrudge's benefaction, noted as due at Michaelmas 1797.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment received from Mr Cooke of Bookham for the first half-year instalment of Dr Shortrudge's benefaction, amounting to £110 0s 0d.

rows.description: Jan. 1 Mr. Geo. Strodes Plate Money
rows.notes: Consensus reached for amounts and row type. Minor description difference ('Strodes' vs 'Strode's') not critical.
rows.english_description: Plate money received from Mr George Strode.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money received from Mr George Strode, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: Dec. 30 Rent of L. Wittenham Rectory to Michl
rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identified the date as 'Dec. 30' and the amount as '55 0 0'. gpt-5-mini misread the date as 'Jan. 30' and the pounds amount as '550'.
rows.english_description: Rent received from the Little Wittenham rectory at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent received from the Little Wittenham rectory at Michaelmas, amounting to £55 0s 0d.

rows.description: — 16 Of Mr. Glubb, Bursar, Inc. Domns. at Xmas

rows.english_description_with_amount: Receipt from Mr Glubb, the Bursar, including dominical/income items at Christmas, amounting to £12 9s 4½d.

rows.description: — 27 Hon. Wm. Herberts Plate Money

rows.english_description: Plate money received from the Hon. William Herbert.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Plate money received from the Hon. William Herbert, amounting to £10 0s 0d.

rows.description: — Of Mr. Hinton, Seal Money for 5 leavers (recd by late Rector)

rows.english_description_with_amount: Seal money received from Mr Hinton for five leavers, amounting to £2 10s 0d.

rows.description: Mar. 31 Settled with Mr. Martin; for Merton, viz.
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash. Description 'Mr. Martin' is clearer in the image than gpt-5-mini's 'Mr. Hartin'. This row serves as a header, introducing a list of items, and has no amount of its own, so 'header' is correct. gpt-5-mini incorrectly identified it as an 'entry'.
rows.section_header: Mar. 31 Settled with Mr. Martin; for Merton, viz.

rows.description: Money Rent due at Michl. 1797
rows.notes: Full consensus reached. Amounts are clearly visible.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Money rent due at Michaelmas 1797 for Merton, amounting to £265 0s 0d.

rows.english_description: Corn rent for Merton included in the settlement with Mr Martin.

rows.section_header: Mar. 31 Settled with Mr. Martin; for Merton, viz.

rows.description: Deduct
rows.notes: gemini-flash correctly identified 'Deduct' as a standalone header with no associated amount. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged it with the 'Land-Tax' entry and assigned an amount to the combined line.

rows.description: Land-Tax
rows.notes: gemini-flash accurately extracted 'Land-Tax' as a distinct entry with amount '34 7 0'.
rows.english_description: Land tax deducted from the settlement.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Land tax deducted from the settlement, amounting to £34 7s 0d.

rows.description: Leveretts Close
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash. The description 'Leveretts Close' is a more plausible reading of the ambiguous handwriting than gpt-5-mini's 'Severeth Clove'. Row type 'entry' is correct for an individual deduction; gpt-5-mini incorrectly labeled it 'total'. Amounts (6 10 10) are clear and agreed.
rows.english_description: Deduction or payment relating to Leveretts Close.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Deduction or payment relating to Leveretts Close, amounting to £6 10s 10d.

rows.notes: Adopted gpt-5-mini's description '40:17:10' as it directly reflects the text on the page, rather than an interpretive label. The amounts (40 17 10) are in full consensus and represent the total deductions.

rows.description: Balance received
rows.notes: Adopted description from consensus. Row type 'total' from gpt-5-mini is more appropriate than 'header' for a line with an amount. The amount is clearly written as '23 /1 5½' in the image, interpreted as £23 1s 5½d, as correctly identified by gemini-flash. gpt-5-mini misread this amount as '231 15 2', which, while consistent with the arithmetic of previous totals, does not match the actual written value for 'Balance received'.

rows.description: May 6. Of Mr. Cooke 2d. half Year of Dr. Shortrudges Benefaction due at Xmas. 1797
rows.notes: Adopted gemini-flash. The amount is clearly visible as '110 0 0'. gpt-5-mini misread the pounds as '1110', despite noting its own uncertainty.
rows.english_description: Second half-year payment from Mr Cooke for Dr Shortrudge's benefaction, noted as due at Christmas 1797.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Second half-year payment from Mr Cooke for Dr Shortrudge's benefaction, amounting to £110 0s 0d.
